---
title: "Microbiota Thesis Pipeline"
subtitle: "Bioinformatics workflow and reproducible analyses"
author: "Mayela Fosado-Mendoza"
---

![](figures/slug.jpg){width="450"}

<small><em>Photograph by Dr. Alfredo Varela-Echavarría</em></small>

# Welcome {.unnumbered}

This repository contains the bioinformatics pipeline developed during my undergraduate thesis focused on the body wall microbiota of *Deroceras laeve*.

It organizes computational workflows, analytical scripts, and selected outputs generated throughout the project.

# Pipeline Scope {.unnumbered}

-   Sequence preprocessing and quality control\
-   Taxonomic profiling of microbial communities\
-   Functional annotation and KEGG-based exploration\
-   Statistical analyses in R\
-   Reproducible visualizations and figures

# Project Purpose {.unnumbered}

This resource was created to document the thesis workflow.

# Academic Context {.unnumbered}

Undergraduate thesis in Microbiology\
Universidad Autónoma de Querétaro (UAQ), Mexico

External supervisor: Dr. Alfredo Varela-Echavarría (INB, UNAM)

Computational resources from Laboratorio Nacional de Visualización Científica Avanzada (LAVIS), UNAM Juriquilla.

# Explore {.unnumbered}

Use the navigation panel to browse workflow steps, analyses, figures, and project notes.

# Contact {.unnumbered}

**Mayela Fosado-Mendoza**\
GitHub: [Mayfm](https://github.com/Mayfm) Email: `maye.fosado@gmail.com`
